categories.name: Lending
categories.description: AI and technology solutions that automate, accelerate, and improve credit decisioning, loan origination, servicing, and collections across all consumer and commercial loan types.

subcategories.name: Credit Underwriting & Decisioning
subcategories.description: Credit underwriting and decisioning platforms provide the scoring models, rules engines, and alternative data signals that drive loan approval, pricing, and risk segmentation. Products in this category range from standalone AI credit model vendors to integrated decisioning APIs that plug into existing LOS workflows. Buyers are typically Chief Credit Officers, Chief Risk Officers, and heads of consumer or commercial lending.
subcategories.ai_opportunities: AI is enabling community banks and credit unions to underwrite thin-file borrowers using alternative data — cash flow, rent history, and gig income — dramatically expanding addressable lending markets while maintaining or improving credit performance compared to traditional bureau-only models.

products.description: Explainable machine learning credit underwriting model; replaces or augments FICO-based decisioning with gradient boosting and neural net ensemble
AI-powered personal loan, auto, and HELOC origination platform with AI decisioning and servicing; FIs fund loans on-balance-sheet or via white-label arrangement.
Open banking-based income and employment verification for loan origination; analyzes live payroll and bank data

ML-powered credit decisioning platform for credit unions with embedded fair lending monitoring; disparate impact analysis (DIA) module quantitatively measures adverse treatment of protected classes; automated adverse action explanation; primary purpose is credit underwriting, not standalone fair lending analytics.
Tri-merge and other credit report services for lending support integrated with nCino; provides innovative data solutions to assist financial institutions with credit decisioning.

Credit decisioning and risk intelligence platform for financial institutions; enables lenders to build, deploy, and monitor AI-powered credit decision workflows with configurable policies, data integrations, and real-time decisioning across the loan origination lifecycle.

AI-powered credit decision intelligence platform that combines machine learning with human expertise to help financial institutions manage risk and improve operational efficiency; delivers transparent, explainable decisioning that regulators and examiners can audit with full decision audit trails.

AI-powered permissioned data platform that accelerates income, employment, cash-flow, and stipulation verification for lenders. Uses ML and alternative data (bank data, permissioned payroll, etc.) to reduce manual workloads, improve pull-through rates, and approve more creditworthy applicants. Pre-fills applications and cross-walks data across SoS, IRS, DoD, SBA, Google.
Data analytics platform providing standardized metrics, credit decisioning models, and AI-driven insights for financial institutions; integrated with nCino for actionable lending analytics.
Cashflow bureau platform for credit unions that transforms first-party transaction data into predictive credit attributes for smarter, faster underwriting; integrates with Symitar via SymXchange.

Industry-standard credit risk score used by financial institutions for consumer loan underwriting decisions; predictive model trained on credit bureau tradeline data to produce a 300-850 score predicting probability of delinquency; used by virtually all US community banks and credit unions as the primary credit risk input for personal loans, auto loans, credit cards, and home equity lines; FICO Score 8, 9, and 10/10T are current versions; FICO Score 10T incorporates trended credit data for improved predictive accuracy

Machine learning-enhanced credit scoring and risk decisioning layer for financial institutions; neural network models trained on Equifax credit bureau data plus alternative data sources to produce risk scores with better predictive accuracy than traditional scorecards, particularly for thin-file and credit-invisible consumers; enables community banks and credit unions to underwrite borrowers who score poorly on traditional models; delivered as score overlays or full ML decision models via Equifax InterConnect real-time API

Agentic AI spreading platform using IDP, NLP, and LLMs to auto-extract and map financial statements to bank-specific templates. Integrates with the ACTICO Credit Risk Platform for end-to-end commercial credit decisioning from spreading through underwriting.

Proprietary consumer lending origination and management platform for credit union and bank partners. Includes ML underwriting engine, automation and advanced credit modeling, loan origination/management system, flexible capital access infrastructure (direct funding or participation network), and AI-driven portfolio reporting. 400%+ increase in monthly loan originations post-enhancement.

Cash flow data bureau providing ML-enriched transaction attributes for FI credit decisioning and underwriting; analyzes permissioned consumer bank transaction data to produce income estimate, expense categorization, cash flow volatility, and spending stability scores as structured inputs for loan underwriting models; enables community banks and CDFIs to underwrite thin-file or credit-invisible borrowers using cash flow data in place of or alongside traditional credit scores

AI-powered second-look credit decisioning network for financial institution lenders; FI partners route declined or marginal consumer loan applications to Pagaya's deep learning model for a second underwriting decision; loans approved by Pagaya are funded by Pagaya's institutional capital network rather than the FI's balance sheet; FI partners earn origination fees and serve more applicants without expanding their own credit risk appetite; use cases include personal loans, auto loans, and credit card origination; model trained on 100M+ loan performance data points
Explainable AI platform for business and commercial credit decisioning. Supports origination through portfolio monitoring. Transparent AI (not a black box) — shows why loans are approved or denied.
End-to-end AI-powered loan origination and management platform for banks and credit unions; automates credit decisioning, AML/KYC checks, digital onboarding, payments, and collections.

AI credit analyst platform for community banks and credit unions with $100M to $10B in assets. Scans the commercial deposit base for lending opportunities, automates credit underwriting package assembly, and provides daily portfolio monitoring with explainable audit trails aligned to examiner expectations.

Cross-border credit data platform that enables financial institutions to underwrite international applicants and immigrants using their home-country credit history; Nova Credit Bureau translates credit data from 20+ countries into US-equivalent credit reports (Cash Atlas score) consumable by FI underwriting systems; enables community banks and credit unions serving immigrant communities to make credit decisions for applicants who have thin or no US credit file; use cases include personal loans, auto loans, and credit cards for new-to-country applicants

Automated credit underwriting and fraud model construction platform that deploys inside the institution's own AWS environment; builds and refreshes models from the FI's own transaction and performance data; targets the 5-10% model performance improvement that translates to material portfolio loss reduction at scale

AI-augmented credit decision and strategy platform; no-code strategy builder enables underwriters to define and test credit policies in natural language without SAS or Python; combines bureau data, alternative data, and behavioral analytics; global vendor with US market presence targeting community and regional bank modernization of credit decisioning infrastructure

subcategories.name: Loan Origination Systems
subcategories.description: Loan origination systems are end-to-end platforms that manage the full loan lifecycle from application through approval, closing, and booking. AI-enhanced LOS vendors embed automated underwriting, document extraction, e-signature, and workflow orchestration directly into the platform. Primary buyers are heads of lending, COOs, and digital transformation leaders at community banks and credit unions.
subcategories.ai_opportunities: AI is dramatically compressing loan cycle times — from days to minutes for consumer loans — by automating income verification, document classification, fraud checks, and compliance review within the origination workflow, directly improving both member experience and loan officer productivity.

Gamified digital onboarding and account activation platform. Guides new account holders through funding, direct deposit setup, and debit card activation via personalized in-app journeys inside existing digital banking apps.
Unified origination platform for deposit and loan accounts across digital and branch channels for credit unions. Built-in cross-sell, quick deploy, compliance-ready.

Industry-leading loan document preparation system for community banks. Used to produce compliant loan closing documents across consumer, mortgage, and commercial categories. Stands alone as a doc prep tool regardless of core.

Automates extraction from PDFs, CSVs, and images, performs global cash flow analysis, and tracks covenants. Part of a broader commercial lending automation suite covering borrowing base, ABL, and portfolio monitoring.

Credit union-focused digital account opening platform integrated with loan origination via arc OS and arc DX. Streamlines membership account opening in under six minutes with fraud detection, application pre-fill, and a unified origination experience across loans and deposits. Rebranded from CU Direct.

Fully configurable mortgage LOS for community banks and credit unions supporting retail, wholesale, and correspondent channels on a single platform. Flexible cloud-based mortgage LOS with POS, ACE workflow automation, vendor-agnostic APIs, and support for forward and reverse lending. Widely adopted by credit unions. Recently acquired by PartnerOne; continues as a standalone product with existing integrations maintained.

Configurable SaaS mortgage point-of-sale platform that powers an end-to-end borrower journey from application through close; streamlines mortgage origination with automated document collection, real-time status updates, and flexible workflows that reduce fallout and improve borrower experience.

India's largest debt platform entering the US market; end-to-end loan operating system with an embedded borrower marketplace connecting lenders, co-lenders, and institutional capital; supports full loan lifecycle from origination through servicing; US market entry announced at FinovateSpring 2026

subcategories.name: Small Business & Commercial Lending

Chief Credit Officers, commercial lending managers, and SBA department heads are the primary buyers.
subcategories.ai_opportunities: AI-driven cash flow analysis and automated financial spreading are reducing commercial credit memo preparation from hours to minutes, allowing community banks to compete with larger institutions on turnaround time while also opening the door to serving underbanked small businesses that lack traditional credit documentation.

products.description: Digital small business loan origination with AI-powered pre-qualification and decisioning; integrates with Jack Henry, Fiserv, and FIS cores

Cash flow-based AI underwriting platform for small business and commercial loans at credit unions and community banks; reduces loan processing time from days to hours.
AI-native loan origination platform for SBA 7(a) and commercial lending; automates document collection, financial analysis, and compliance workflows.

SMB cash flow analytics and next-best-product recommendation engine embedded in digital banking, giving business customers real-time financial insights and FIs actionable cross-sell leads.
Patented platform automating loan participations and syndications integrated directly with nCino; reduces concentration risk, boosts liquidity, and provides access to 850+ FI buyers.

Hosted web-based loan pricing and profitability tool for community bank lenders. Provides core-integrated data analytics, ROE targets, relationship profitability scoring, and cost-of-funds tracking updated automatically from FHLB data.

categories.name: Operations & Automation
categories.description: AI and automation tools that streamline back-office operations, document processing, workflow automation, and third-party risk management at financial institutions.

subcategories.name: Intelligent Document Processing
subcategories.description: Intelligent document processing (IDP) platforms use AI-powered OCR, natural language processing, and machine learning to automatically extract, classify, and validate data from loan documents, account opening forms, financial statements, insurance certificates, and other unstructured documents that flow through FI operations. Products eliminate manual data entry and reduce document handling errors. Loan operations leaders, COOs, and back-office managers are the primary buyers.
subcategories.ai_opportunities: AI document processing that can extract structured data from handwritten forms, PDFs, and multi-page financial packets with 95%+ accuracy is transforming FI back offices, enabling straight-through processing for document-heavy workflows like mortgage, commercial credit, and account opening that previously required significant manual review.

products.description: E-signature and Intelligent Agreement Management platform integrated with nCino for paperless loan document workflows, digital closing, and contract lifecycle management within Salesforce.

Industry-leading loan document preparation system for community banks. Used to produce compliant loan closing documents across consumer, mortgage, and commercial categories. Stands alone as a doc prep tool regardless of core.
AI-powered financial document processing: bank statements, pay stubs, tax returns, and rent rolls with 99%+ extraction accuracy and embedded fraud signals

Banking document management and exception tracking solution for banks and credit unions; provides integrated imaging, loan document exception tracking, and workflow automation to ensure every loan document is tracked, accessible, and compliance-ready throughout the lending lifecycle.

Award-winning deposit operations platform that modernizes check and deposit processing for banks and credit unions; streamlines item processing across all deposit channels, lowers operational costs, and mitigates fraud through automated image quality and risk analytics on a single unified platform.
Enterprise content management with workflow automation, eForms, and record retention for credit unions integrated with Corelation KeyStone.
Electronic document management system with Check 21, teller and branch check capture, and compliant document storage and retrieval.
Customized production and delivery of credit union member correspondence, statements, notices, and letters from KeyStone output.
Financial document design, mobile-compatible e-delivery, and marketing for credit unions; over 40 years of CU document industry experience.
Electronic signature solution integrated with nCino to create and manage e-signature transactions seamlessly from within the nCino platform for loan and account agreements.

Cloud-based automated commercial loan document generation platform. Assembles attorney-quality closing documents clause-by-clause based on lender preferences, transaction terms, property type, and location. Full 50-state compliance, NCUA/state/internal policy guardrails, LOS integration. Designed for complex loans $2M+. First purely SaaS automated loan doc generation system.
Mobile enterprise digital transaction management platform for credit unions including e-signing, forms automation, check imaging, and RDC for 800+ CUs.
Secure end-to-end print and digital communications for FIs including member statements, tax documents, and data-driven marketing correspondence.
Print and digital member communications with 50+ years of CU experience, delivering customized statements and engagement solutions.
AI-powered mobile image capture for RDC providing 99% first-time image acceptance for checks, IDs, W-2s, and tax documents.
High-quality check and document scanners for financial institutions improving cost, efficiency, and compliance in document capture.
Multi-function check/ID scanning, driver license scanning, inkjet and thermal printing device for credit union branch operations.

Secure digital vault and collaboration platform built for bankers enabling secure file sharing, document collection, workflow automation, and digital storage for loans, audits, and commercial banking.
AI-powered mortgage document indexing, classification, stacking automation, and data extraction for lenders and servicers
Intelligent document processing for community banks and credit unions; captures, classifies, and extracts structured data from any financial document type
AI-powered mobile check capture and remote deposit capture processing.

Enterprise content management, intelligent document processing, and process automation platform; covers loan document management, compliance workflows, and back-office automation; integrates natively with Jack Henry Episys.

Configurable SaaS mortgage point-of-sale platform that powers an end-to-end borrower journey from application through close; streamlines mortgage origination with automated document collection, real-time status updates, and flexible workflows that reduce fallout and improve borrower experience.
Print, mail, and digital communications solutions for credit unions including statements, notices, and multi-channel engagement.
AI-powered document fraud detection and income verification; analyzes bank statements, pay stubs, and tax documents for authenticity signals and income extraction

AI-powered document verification and data extraction platform for consumer and auto lending at financial institutions; uses computer vision and NLP to automatically extract and verify data from income documents (pay stubs, W-2s, tax returns), insurance certificates, vehicle titles, and registration documents in auto and personal loan origination; integrates with major LOS platforms to deliver instant document verification decisions; reduces manual review queues and catches document fraud in indirect auto lending dealer submissions

AI-powered portfolio intelligence layer for community bank commercial and SMB lending; surfaces real-time risk signals, covenant breach indicators, opportunity alerts, and portfolio health indicators; analytics overlay that integrates with existing LOS and core banking data without requiring a platform replacement. Predecessor product; rebranded to Casca (Casca AI Loan Origination) in 2023.

subcategories.name: Back-Office Process Automation
subcategories.description: AI-enhanced back-office automation platforms combine robotic process automation (RPA), intelligent workflow orchestration, and exception-handling AI to automate repetitive, rules-driven back-office processes across account servicing, payment operations, compliance reporting, and loan administration. Products in this category address the operational complexity of community banks and credit unions that run multiple legacy systems. COOs, operations managers, and IT leaders are the buyers.
subcategories.ai_opportunities: AI-enhanced process automation that can handle exception cases and unstructured inputs — not just rigid RPA scripts — is enabling community financial institutions to automate far more of their back-office work than traditional RPA allowed, reducing operational cost without requiring core system replacement.

products.description: Enterprise content management, intelligent document processing, and process automation platform; covers loan document management, compliance workflows, and back-office automation; integrates natively with Jack Henry Episys.

Agentic AI platform for lending automation at community banks and credit unions; automates loan origination workflows, document collection, compliance checks, and decisioning steps using AI agents; NCUA-compliant; no-code configuration for FI staff

High-speed laser check printing and archiving solution supporting high-volume multi-printer/branch check printing for credit unions.

Intelligent automation platform combining RPA, AI, and process orchestration; FI deployments cover account reconciliation, regulatory reporting, loan processing, and exception handling.

Technology consulting and digital transformation services for financial institutions; integrates with Jack Henry core platforms via jXchange to modernize workflows and operational efficiency.
No-code platform for transforming complex forms and customer data intake into digital journeys; integrates with Symitar to streamline member interactions and automate CU workflows.
Digital commercial escrow and subaccounting platform (ZEscrow) enabling FIs to offer IOLTA, real estate, and business escrow management within digital banking.

No-code CRM and workflow automation platform with banking use cases for front and middle office; covers customer onboarding, lending, deposit accounts, contact center, and compliance workflows.

Business process management and API orchestration platform that sits above existing bank cores; enables multi-core FI environments to deliver consistent digital experiences and connect AI vendor tools to core data without core replacement; omnichannel workflow engine

Digital adoption and in-application guidance platform for financial institution staff; reduces onboarding friction, compliance errors, and training time inside loan origination systems and core banking platforms; overlays contextual guidance on existing software without code changes

subcategories.name: Vendor & Third-Party Risk
subcategories.description: Vendor and third-party risk AI platforms automate due diligence questionnaire management, continuous vendor monitoring, cyber risk scoring, and contract risk analysis across the vendor ecosystem that community financial institutions manage — often 100–300 vendors. These tools help institutions meet regulatory expectations for third-party risk management (TPRM) without large dedicated risk teams. Chief Risk Officers, vendor management officers, and IT security leaders are the buyers.
subcategories.ai_opportunities: AI-powered continuous vendor monitoring that flags cybersecurity incidents, financial distress signals, and regulatory actions at FI vendors in near real-time is transforming third-party risk from an annual questionnaire exercise into a live risk management function, as regulators increasingly expect proactive rather than reactive TPRM.

products.description: End-to-end third-party risk management platform for community banks and credit unions; covers vendor inventory management, inherent and residual risk scoring, due diligence questionnaire (DDQ) distribution and tracking, contract management, SLA monitoring, fourth-party risk identification, and exam-ready regulatory reporting for FFIEC, OCC Bulletin 2013-29, FDIC FIL-44-2008, and NCUA examinations; also offers managed due diligence service where Venminder staff conducts vendor assessments on behalf of FI clients; includes pre-built risk assessments for common FI vendor categories (core banking, digital banking, payment processing)

Vendor management and third-party risk module within the Ncontracts GRC platform for community banks and credit unions; provides vendor inventory, inherent risk tiering, due diligence questionnaire workflows, vendor approval tracking, ongoing monitoring alerts, and regulatory reporting for OCC, FDIC, and NCUA vendor management guidance; integrated with other Ncontracts modules (Nrisk, Ncompliance) for unified GRC workflows.

Enterprise risk management and vendor risk platform with documented community bank and credit union deployments; vendor risk module covers vendor registration, risk classification, due diligence questionnaire management, control assessments, and ongoing monitoring; tightly integrated with LogicManager ERM for enterprise-wide risk aggregation; regulatory mapping for FFIEC, NCUA, and OCC vendor management requirements; bank-specific risk taxonomies and compliance frameworks pre-built

Third-party risk management platform for financial institutions with AI-assisted risk intelligence and continuous monitoring; automates vendor due diligence questionnaire distribution, response analysis, and risk scoring; continuously monitors vendor risk from cyber threat intelligence feeds, financial health data, news monitoring, and regulatory action databases; NLP-assisted contract review identifies risk clauses; financial services clients include banks, credit unions, insurers, and asset managers; supports FFIEC, GDPR, and SOC 2 compliance workflows

Third-party fintech risk assessment and monitoring platform for community banks and credit unions. Integrated GRC platform for community FIs; vendor management, BCP, risk assessment, and audit tracking with emerging AI features for exam prep
Governance, risk, and compliance platform for FIs; covers vendor management, policy management, audit, and exam management with AI-assisted workflow
Automated cybersecurity governance platform for community FIs; covers InfoSec governance, FFIEC CAT replacement, user access reporting, and vendor risk management.

Integrated risk governance platform spanning model risk management, operational risk, enterprise risk, and third-party risk on a single adaptive data layer. Configures in days and connects risk functions with full audit trails. Scales from community bank through enterprise.

subcategories.name: Core Banking Integration & API Middleware
subcategories.description: Core banking integration and API middleware platforms provide the connectivity, data transformation, and orchestration layers that enable fintech solutions to integrate reliably with FIS, Fiserv, Jack Henry, Symitar, and other core systems used by community banks and credit unions. Products range from lightweight API connectors to full integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) solutions. IT leaders, CTOs, and digital transformation officers are the primary buyers.
subcategories.ai_opportunities: AI-enhanced middleware that can intelligently route, transform, and reconcile data across heterogeneous core and fintech systems is reducing integration project timelines and maintenance burden, a critical enabler for community institutions that want to deploy best-of-breed AI tools without the multi-year core replacement projects they cannot afford.

products.description: Enterprise open finance connectivity platform; replaces screen scraping and credential sharing with FDX-standard API-based data sharing; provides FDX-compliant open banking APIs and direct integrations into business applications; Section 1033 compliance infrastructure for community banks and credit unions facing CFPB open banking mandates; integrated with Narmi and Candescent digital banking platforms.

jXchange is Jack Henry's open API framework that enables financial institutions to integrate third-party fintech applications with Jack Henry's core banking platforms. Core banking platform for retail and universal banks; supports multi-currency, multi-entity, Islamic banking, and lending; deployed at mid-to-large and international banks.
Core banking suite for retail, universal, and Islamic banks; API-first, cloud-first; supports banking-as-a-service and embedded finance; deployed at 500+ FIs worldwide.

API-first digital banking and open banking integration platform for community banks and credit unions; enables connectivity between fintech vendors and core banking systems (FIS, Fiserv, Jack Henry, CSI); 40+ core integrations; Fintech Connector module for B2B FI-to-vendor API management

Cloud-native core banking, digital banking, and payments platform built for credit unions; serves ~400 CUs after acquiring HomeCU and CUProdigy.
Automated account holder acquisition technology that switches direct deposits and recurring payments from old accounts to new FI accounts.

API-first middleware platform that connects core banking systems to fintech partners, aggregates data across integrations, and enables community banks and credit unions to streamline operations and unlock new revenue streams.
